testcase.name: validRegistrationTest

failure.message: Expected condition failed: waiting for visibility of Proxy element for: DefaultElementLocator 'By.className: result' (tried for 10 seconds with 500 milliseconds interval)

testcase.name: validCouponTest

failure.message: Valid coupon was not applied. Message: The coupon code you entered couldn't be applied to your order expected [false] but found [true]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: Valid coupon was not applied.
